frontmatter.title: Programs that I use on a Daily basis
frontmatter.excerpt: Get to know what programs I like.

pageProps.content:
**Computer:**

**OS:** Windows 11 Pro

**Browser:** Google Chrome

**IDE:** VS Code (Sync)

**Video:** VLC (dark theme)

**Compressing:** 7zip (dark theme)

**Chatting:** Discord and Slack

**Gaming:** Steam (cs go: -novid)

**Music:** Spotify

**Minecraft:** Optifine and Java

**Video Editing:** DaVinci Resolve

**Prototyping:** Figma, Adobe XD or InVision

**Photo Editing:** Photoshop

**Documents:** Office

**Terminal:** Windows Terminal

**Extensions:** Bitwarden

**Extra:** Git, NodeJS, PicoTorrent

---

**Android:**

**Browser:** Brave

**Youtube:** Vanced

**2FA:** Google Auth

**Password:** Bitwarden

**Notes:** Notion

---

**Linux:**

**Photo Editing:** GIMP

**Documents:** LibreOffice or OnlyOffice

**Apps:** Snapcraft or Flathub
